creator: milojah@gmail.com
text:
I just added a SIL3112a generic SATA controller and 2 Optiarc
DVD RW AD-7170S/1.00 drives. Machine has an existing IDE controller
with LITE-ON DVDRW SHW-160P6S/PS0B.

During boot system hangs after displaying cd0 messages (IDE). Problem
goes away after rebooting to original kernel.

Fix: 

unknown
How-To-Repeat: Boot with atapicam enabled
